eat anything, never gain weight::never sleep again, always feel fully rested
talk to animals, but they only complain::understand all languages, but can only whisper
every other food tastes like your favorite food::your favorite food tastes like dirt
only speak in rhymes for the rest of your life::only walk backward for the rest of your life
know what someone is thinking, but only if it's about squirrels::know where any lost item is, but can never get it back
every drink you have tastes like water::every food you eat tastes like chicken
always find the perfect, closest parking spot instantly::always know exactly where your keys, wallet, or phone are
every laugh makes a random animal sound come out::every sneeze swaps you with the closest person for 5 minutes
only drink beverages that are naturally bright green::only eat foods that are naturally bright pink
always feel perfectly comfortable::have perfect timing for everything
every meal is a 5-star gourmet dish::your exact craving available instantly
every door opens to a puff of glitter::every step makes a soft 'boing' sound
be invisible, but only when alone::fly, but only 10 feet high
every banana eaten, sing opera::every book open, tiny frog jumps out
expert musician, but only with veggie instruments::master chef, but only with foraged food
have perfect memory of *everything* you've ever experienced::instantly master any skill you *see* once
every doorway, your outfit randomly changes::every fridge open, it's full of a random *gourmet* meal
always know exactly what *any* animal needs/wants::instantly understand and fix *any* tech issue
every door you open plays a random, cheesy jingle.::your phone only charges to 10% maximum.
control the weather, but only for an hour once a week.::teleport, but you always arrive 5 minutes *before* you left.
all drinks you have are always lukewarm, no matter what.::all fruit you eat tastes like plain mashed potato.
enjoy perfectly controlled 72°f weather, always::experience the best day of every season, perfectly
every meal is a delicious, healthy surprise::only eat your absolute favorite meal, every day
instantly learn any language fluently::instantly master any musical instrument perfectly
you eat a spoonful of live, wriggling *worms* for $1,000,000.::your *best friend* eats the same worms for $1,000,000, you watch.
instantly know everyone's *deepest secret*.::instantly make everyone *forget* their deepest secret.
$10m lottery, but your voice is *dying goat* forever.::dream job for life, but always wear a *wetsuit* socially.
all food tastes like rotten garbage, but you're never hungry.::constant itching, everywhere, forever.
your cry makes a nearby person confess an embarrassing secret.::your laugh makes a nearby person fart loudly.
universally hated, but you're the only one who saves the world.::universally loved, but you only speak animal noises.
become a legend, but your most embarrassing moment is famous.::live total anonymity, with zero embarrassing moments known.
fart a perfect opera aria, every single time.::sneeze out live goldfish, every single time.
change anyone's hair, but it resets every hour.::know anyone's death date instantly, but can't tell them.

all your food is bland, but every meal you eat saves a random endangered species.::every food you eat is the most delicious thing imaginable, but you must publicly eat a spoonful of earwax once a day.

instantly erase any embarrassing memory from anyone, but they replace it with a fabricated one of you doing something silly.::know the absolute truth behind any conspiracy, but you can never convince anyone else.
every compliment you give makes the receiver grow a third eye on their forehead.::every insult you give makes your own hair turn bright green for a week.
eradicate all mosquitoes forever. eat one live, wriggling tarantula.::save the last 'rainbow unicorn beetles'. all human tech reverts to 1990, forever.
control weather in a 1-mile radius. burst into bad song every time you get nervous.::instantly recall everything you've seen/read. speak in a permanent high-pitched squeak.
free unlimited clean energy for all. all music becomes generic elevator music, forever.::replicate any food by looking. your only transport is a unicycle, forever.
